name: System Designers Design Pack
description: Bundles sequence diagram generation and trade-off analysis for system designers. Covers the two most time-consuming design documentation tasks: visualisation and option comparison.
author: ai-skills-maintainer

delivery_modes.instructions: Describe the interaction in plain English in Copilot Chat using the skill definition as the system prompt. Copy the Mermaid output directly into your Markdown doc.
The portal generates both a sequence diagram and a trade-off matrix in a single call.
Expose as an MCP tool callable from documentation tooling (Confluence, Notion, GitHub Wiki).
Deploy as a Copilot Studio skill accessible from the system design review Teams channel.
Deploy via internal API layer for confidential system design documentation.

configuration.additional_notes: Slightly higher temperature allows more natural diagram labelling. Claude 3.5 Sonnet performs better on complex multi-branch diagrams.

changelog.notes: Initial package with sequence diagram generator and trade-off analysis support.
